label: 第258話
source_locator: 単行本29巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 宿儺は即席の領域展開「伏魔御厨子」を再発動する。虎杖は簡易領域で耐え、憂憂との入れ替え修行によって短期間に結界術と反転術式を身につけた経緯が明かされる。
summary_full: 宿儺は即席の領域展開「伏魔御厨子」を再発動する。虎杖は簡易領域で耐え、憂憂との入れ替え修行によって短期間に結界術と反転術式を身につけた経緯が明かされる。宿儺は黒閃で得た即席回路と縛りにより、出力・範囲を落とさない伏魔御廚子を再展開する。入れ替え修行で虎杖が日下部から簡易領域、乙骨から反転術式を学んだと判明する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 黒閃 ramps up the voltage for both 悠仁 and 宿儺 . The King of Curses regains an old reliable ability while 悠仁 and his allies display new techniques. The reason for 悠仁's accelerated growth as a sorcerer is...!
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: While in an awakened state after landing two 黒閃, 五条悟 constructed a unique 反転術式 circuit that dispersed the burden and operation of the technique across different regions of his brain, allowing him to restore his 反転術式 output. 宿儺 attempts to replicate this method in order to regenerate his lost hands, but 悠仁’s barrage of seven 黒閃, each striking the boundary between 宿儺’s soul and 伏黒恵 ’s, prevents him from doing so. Elsewhere, ミゲル praises ラルゥ for his efforts before suddenly panicking upon noticing something approaching in the distance. "The king's domain returns to its master in a shower of black sparks." Supported by a grotesque, demonic manifestation, 宿儺 reactivates 伏魔御廚子 . By altering the domain ’s hand signs and utilizing portions of his brain unaffected by 無量空処 to apply both his 術式 and barrier technique , 宿儺 uses the awakening induced by 黒閃 to resurrect 伏魔御廚子. Through the inclusion of uncertain conditions and improvised binding vows , he is able to restore the domain without reducing its effective range or output. The domain’s destructive effect spreads across 新宿 , collapsing buildings and reducing all living beings within its range to dust. Previously, while formulating their strategy against 宿儺, 秤金次 insisted that only sorcerers capable of using 反転術式 or possessing countermeasures against domains should participate in the battle, with 禪院真希 being the sole exception. 脹相 suggested that both he and 悠仁 could learn 反転術式, much to 悠仁’s confusion. To clarify, 脹相 asked how the three sorcerers capable of using 反転術式 compensate for blood loss. 秤 and 憂太 admitted they did not know, as they performed it instinctively, while 硝子 correctly explained that they convert 呪力 into blood. She further elaborated that while many sorcerers can heal themselves, they struggle to heal others due to compatibility issues, as a recipient may reject the healer’s 呪力 or fail to respond to its conversion, resulting in varying effectiveness. 憂憂 explains the keys to "replacement training". Upon hearing this, 脹相 reveals that his constitution as a 呪胎: 呪胎九相図 allows him to freely convert 呪力 into blood, and that 悠仁 would likely be able to do the same after absorbing the remaining 呪胎九相図. This would exempt them from the massive 呪力 consumption typically required for 反転術式, making it significantly easier for them to learn. 脹相 then proposes that a sorcerer capable of using 反転術式 be included in what he calls “replacement training,” further confusing 悠仁. The sorcerers use 簡易領域 to resist 宿儺's assault. 憂憂 explains that his 術式 involves the spatial transference of marked targets, allowing him to teleport himself and others to specific locations or individuals. He further reveals that the technique can swap the souls of marked individuals without altering their physical forms, likening people to boxes and their souls to the contents inside. 日下部篤也 adds that 悠仁’s rapid growth as a sorcerer is due to muscle memory formed while 宿儺 used jujutsu within his body. Applying this principle, 日下部 plans to swap souls with 悠仁 during replacement training, allowing 悠仁’s body to retain the fundamentals of 呪力 manipulation and the use of 簡易領域 . 秤 questions whether the 縛り preventing 簡易領域 from being taught outside the 新陰流 Style school would interfere, but 冥冥 assures him it will not. 憂憂 then cautions that a person may only undergo soul swapping twice per month, urging the group to choose their pairings carefully. The flames of certain death burst forth! In the present, 悠仁 activates 簡易領域 in response to 宿儺’s 領域展開, shielding himself from the incoming slashes. Noticing blood seeping from the demonic manifestation, 悠仁 deduces that the domain is incomplete and resolves to endure it. His assessment proves correct, as 宿儺 is currently unable to maintain his open-barrier, high-output domain for more than 99 seconds. Simultaneously, 猪野琢真 and 脹相 withstand the slashes using their own Simple Domains, while 真希 is protected by 三輪霞 ’s. Just before 伏魔御廚子 collapses, 悠仁’s 簡易領域 is forcibly stripped away, resulting in multiple slashes that sever his left foot. Using 赤血操術 to reattach and heal the injury, 悠仁 is relieved that his allies survived the domain’s duration, only to watch flames erupt from 宿儺’s hand as he chants, “竈! Open!”
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 宿儺 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 (言及のみ) ミゲル Oduol ラルゥ 秤金次 (回想) 乙骨憂太 (回想) 家入硝子 (回想) 冥冥 (回想) 憂憂 (回想) 日下部篤也 (回想) 星綺羅羅 (回想) 日車寛見 (回想) 三輪霞 禪院真希 猪野琢真 脹相
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 釈魂刀 脹相の術式 簡易領域 三輪霞の術式 簡易領域 宿儺の術式 領域展開：伏魔御廚子 御廚子 竈 竈 猪野琢真の術式 簡易領域 虎杖悠仁の術式 赤血操術 簡易領域

key_events_verified_phase11: 宿儺は即席の領域展開「伏魔御厨子」を再発動する。
虎杖は簡易領域で耐え、憂憂との入れ替え修行によって短期間に結界術と反転術式を身につけた経緯が明かされる。
宿儺は黒閃で得た即席回路と縛りにより、出力・範囲を落とさない伏魔御廚子を再展開する。
入れ替え修行で虎杖が日下部から簡易領域、乙骨から反転術式を学んだと判明する。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
